pages.text: One sunny morning, <name> was playing in his backyard when he heard a tiny, sad squeak. Behind the rose bush, he saw a tiny rainbow dragon sitting on a pile of leaves, looking very glum.
“I’ve lost my magical sparkle,” the dragon sniffled. “Can you help me?” <name> smiled. “Of course!”

The dragon explained that its sparkle returned only when colorful stones were arranged in the right order. <name> spotted red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple stones scattered across the garden. He thought carefully, picked each stone, and placed them in a rainbow line.
But oh no! The dragon’s tiny wings were stuck under some leaves. <name> gently lifted the leaves, careful not to squash the little wings. The dragon wiggled happily and flapped them gently.
Suddenly, the dragon’s body began to glimmer and sparkle, shimmering brighter than ever! It twirled in the air, leaving a trail of rainbow glitter that sparkled on the grass and flowers.
“Thank you, <name>!” the dragon cheered. “Your kindness helped me!”
<name> laughed, brushing a sparkly rainbow speck off his shirt. He realized that helping friends with care and kindness can make even the smallest magic grow bright.
From that day on, whenever <name> played in the backyard, he looked out for tiny friends who might need a little help — and maybe a little sparkle.
